message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Frauen im transformierten Geschlechterverhältnis – Leitbilder, Praxis und Anforderungen an den Wandel (Frauen im Transformationsprozess) 1984/85","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4874","justification":"Survey in the GDR mid‑1980s focusing on women’s roles, self‑image, family and work; directly addresses gender roles in the GDR."},{"title":"Frauen im transformierten Geschlechterverhältnis – Leitbilder, Praxis und Anforderungen an den Wandel (Frauen im Transformationsprozess) 1988/89","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4875","justification":"Follow‑up to the 1984/85 study, again in the GDR, on women’s lives, employment and family; explicitly about gender roles and expectations."},{"title":"Mikrozensus der DDR 1988 – Scientific Use File","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13323","justification":"Large representative household survey from the late GDR; contains variables on sex, family status, employment and division of labor, useful to analyze gender roles in the 1980s."},{"title":"Sozialstrukturanalyse der DDR 1980 (Population Survey)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4871","justification":"GDR population survey at the start of the 1980s; includes gender‑differentiated information on work, education and family, providing context on gender roles."},{"title":"Sozialstrukturanalyse der DDR 1980 (Household Survey)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4872","justification":"Companion household survey to the 1980 population survey; allows examination of gendered division of labor and household roles in the GDR."},{"title":"Sozialindikatorenerhebung DDR 1988 (Social Indicators Survey GDR 1988)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4873","justification":"Late‑1980s GDR social indicators study with attitudes and living conditions by gender; suitable for studying gender roles in work and family."},{"title":"Alltagsleben in der DDR 1980 (Everyday Life in the GDR 1980)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4876","justification":"Survey on everyday life that includes questions about family, work and household; gender comparisons can be used to analyze roles in early 1980s GDR."},{"title":"Alltagsleben in der DDR 1984 (Everyday Life in the GDR 1984)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4877","justification":"Mid‑1980s follow‑up on everyday life; variables on family responsibilities and employment allow investigation of gender norms and practices."},{"title":"Alltagsleben in der DDR 1988 (Everyday Life in the GDR 1988)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4878","justification":"Late‑1980s GDR survey of everyday life; especially useful for tracking changes and continuities in gender roles just before 1990."},{"title":"Frauen und Männer in der DDR – Rollenbilder und Lebensverläufe (Retrospektivbefragung, erhoben 1991 mit Rückbezug auf die 1980er Jahre)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA-study/ZA***","justification":"Retrospective survey conducted after unification but referencing gender roles and life courses in the GDR during the 1980s; useful when focusing specifically on gender and gender roles in that decade."}]}
